stemHtml: Which statement regarding the atmosphere at jet cruise altitudes both above and below the tropopause is accurate?

options.a: Argon may be present in concentrations potentially hazardous to engines with risk of flameout.
options.b: Ozone may be present generating UV radiation potentially hazardous to flight deck crew.
options.c: Ozone may be present in concentrations potentially hazardous to crew and passengers.
options.d: Argon may be present in concentrations potentially hazardous to crew and passengers.
